## event\_target.on() method

监听事件

**Signature:**

```typescript
on<T extends keyof CT, T2 extends (...event_: Parameters<CT[T]>) => void>(type_: T | T[], callback_: T2, target_?: any, once_b_?: boolean): typeof callback_ | null;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  type\_ | T \| T\[\] | 事件类型 |
|  callback\_ | T2 | 触发回调 |
|  target\_ | any | _(Optional)_ 事件目标对象 |
|  once\_b\_ | boolean | _(Optional)_ 是否触发单次 |
